Repairing this inference chain is a plausible primary task.","R1.3":"The paper's central claim is OOD robustness improvement, yet every reported number is top-1 accuracy on standard (in-distribution) test sets; OOD benchmarks (e.g., ImageNet-C, DomainNet) are absent. Evidence-claim misalignment is a live and load-bearing concern.","R1.6":"Prose-level strengthening — tighter sentences, removal of hedging, more assertive claim language — is the most common surface interpretation of 'make this stronger' and is clearly relevant here."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should strengthening focus primarily on prose and rhetorical impact (sentence-level clarity, assertiveness, and flow), or on argumentative substance (for example, addressing the mismatch between the stated OOD robustness claims and the in-distribution test-set metrics used to support them)?"}

rationale.R1.1: Sharpening the thesis and contribution framing — tighter gap statement, crisper positioning of DomainShift-Reg against ERM and weight-decay — is a natural load-bearing task under 'make this stronger'.
rationale.R1.2: A material logical gap is present: gains on standard held-out test sets are presented as evidence of OOD robustness, but those splits are in-distribution by construction. Repairing this inference chain is a plausible primary task.
rationale.R1.3: The paper's central claim is OOD robustness improvement, yet every reported number is top-1 accuracy on standard (in-distribution) test sets; OOD benchmarks (e.g., ImageNet-C, DomainNet) are absent. Evidence-claim misalignment is a live and load-bearing concern.
rationale.R1.6: Prose-level strengthening — tighter sentences, removal of hedging, more assertive claim language — is the most common surface interpretation of 'make this stronger' and is clearly relevant here.

parsed.clarification_question: Should strengthening focus primarily on prose and rhetorical impact (sentence-level clarity, assertiveness, and flow), or on argumentative substance (for example, addressing the mismatch between the stated OOD robustness claims and the in-distribution test-set metrics used to support them)?
